reviews.review_text:
The staff is friendly and the doctors seem competent, but the wait times are insane. Similar to another review, was referred to see a hematologist. First visit took 3+ hours, of which I spent maybe 15 mins getting my blood drawn and seeing the doctor (other 2 hours and 45 mins were waiting). Back for a follow up and have been waiting over an hour again already without being seen.

Vast majority of patients are elderly and perhaps don’t mind waiting, or are used to it, or something? God bless them. For me personally, I can’t just trade entire workdays for waiting to see a doctor who says “oh yeah, iron level is a bit high, come back in a month.” Will probably wait this appointment out since I’m already here, but after that going to search for another provider.

Makes me think about the whole U.S. medical system is broken and inefficient.

No idea how they have 4.7 stars.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello, we are sorry to hear that you were disappointed with the wait time you experienced while in our clinic. We strive to ensure that patients receive their care promptly during scheduled appointments. If you would like to discuss this further, we invite you to contact us directly by visiting FLCancer.com/Patient-Experience. Thank you for taking the time to share your input.

reviews.review_text: Hello, I just wanted to write briefly regarding my experience today (Friday). I just wanted to thank the nurses Shantae, Shanika, and the Medical Assistant CeCe for all their help today. I also wanted to thank Heather and the ladies at the front desk, who were also very patient and kind to me. I was a little nervous about taking some blood tests due to some of my health concerns and they all were very patient and allowed me to ask all my questions.  As the medical staff assisted me, they made me feel calm and comfortable. Honestly I felt like I was being cared for by angels. Also, I would like to thank Dr. Kruglyak for her attentive care as well during my office visits. Thank you for reading.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We're thrilled to hear that your experience has been a positive one. We'll be sure to share your feedback with the team at Florida Cancer Specialists Boca Raton.

reviews.review_text: Great service overall. The staff was friendly, courteous, and very efficient. Once I was seen, everything was handled quickly and professionally.  The perfect outcome when going to the doctor.
reviews.owner_answer: We’re sorry to hear about your experience. Long wait times can be frustrating, especially when you arrive on time for an appointment. We strive to respect everyone’s time and will share your feedback with our team to help improve scheduling and flow. We’re glad to hear the service itself met your expectations.

reviews.review_text: Dr. Reddy is an exceptional medical oncologist and hematologist. He combines deep expertise with kindness and patience, he always taking the time to answer questions and explain things clearly. His calm and caring approach makes a challenging situation much easier. We  recommend him. The staff is always kind, gentle and compassionate. Phone calls are answered in a timely manner. Even though we are in an unfortunate situation we are so fortunate to be in Dr. Reddy's and his staffs care. The Endlich Family
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for your kind words. We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with our team.

reviews.review_text: I'm so happy with this office and doctor Costello.  They are on time, professional and organized.  Dr. Costello is super!  She's knowledgeable, very thorough and a great listener.  So happy I made the move to Florida Cancer Specialists!
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your support! We're honored to be part of your care.

reviews.review_text: After coming in for a blood transfusion, I waited four hours and they never ordered my blood (which takes 3 hours to obtain). I’m new to all of this, but the procedure takes four hours and then you sit for monitoring. A total waste of time. Argh… poor communication and over worked staff.

Dr. Reddy was worth the long drive.  I was very comfortable with his friendly manner and clear explanation of my condition, as well as his plan of action to resolve my problem.
Thank you Dr. Reddy
Dr. Castillo and the entire staff are all great. Dr. Castillo is extremely thorough and detailed. I recommend this practice.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing this thoughtful review. We’re glad to hear that Dr. Castillo and our team made a positive impression, and we appreciate your recommendation. We’re grateful for your support and look forward to welcoming you again.

reviews.review_text: I was there for an iron infusion. The nurses were amazing - professional, caring, proficient and fun!
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing this feedback. We’re glad to hear our nursing team made your visit feel well cared for and comfortable, and we appreciate your kind words about their professionalism and warmth.

reviews.review_text: Dr Krugylak and staff are very nice and knowledgeable. Accommodating to my work schedule also. Great care.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re glad to hear you found Dr. Krugylak and our team friendly, knowledgeable, and accommodating to your schedule, and we appreciate your kind words about the care you received.
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. If there is anything we can do to improve your experience, please let us know.
Thank you for the thoughtful rating. We take feedback seriously and are always looking for ways to enhance the patient experience.

reviews.review_text: waited 3 hours to see dr and my records were not there from my urology operation

reviews.owner_answer: We are honored by your excellent review. Your satisfaction is our ultimate goal, and we are thrilled that we met your expectations.

We are so grateful for your 5-star rating! Our team works hard to ensure every patient has a positive experience. If there’s anything else we can do to make your next visit even better, please let us know.
Thank you for sharing your positive feedback. We appreciate you taking the time to let us know, and we’re glad your experience was a good one.
That 5-star review says a lot—thank you for trusting us with your care!
That 5-star review says a lot—thank you for trusting us with your care!
Thank you for the positive review. Our team is dedicated to providing compassionate care.

reviews.review_text: The employees are true professionals and the doctors are great but they wait is too long to be called
reviews.owner_answer: Your feedback means a lot to our team. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and let us know how we are doing.
Thank you for the 5-star rating! We hope your care experience was as smooth and supportive as we aim for.

reviews.review_text: I feel that the excellent care of my cancer by Dr. Reddy is the reason that I’m still around.   My prostrate cancer spread to my lungs and lymph nodes.  Aggressive treatment by Dr. Reddy arrested the cancer and has allowed me to continue my normal life.  Thank you.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing this thoughtful feedback. We’re glad to hear your care team’s support has helped you continue your normal life, and we will share your kind words with Dr. Reddy and the team.

reviews.review_text: Tiffany was very attentive and made me feel very comfortable.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We're thrilled to hear that your experience has been a positive one. We'll be sure to share your feedback with the team at Florida Cancer Specialists Boca Raton.

reviews.review_text: Dr Reddy has been caring for me for over 12 years. His committed staff and his attention makes a difficult diagnosis manageable and less stressful.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing your experience and trust over the past 12 years. We’re glad our team’s dedicated care has helped make a challenging diagnosis more manageable and less stressful.

reviews.review_text: I am only giving 3 stars because I was there for 2 hours waiting to see the Dr. I gave blood then waited another 1.25 hrs. Finally saw the PA, which she is very good. When checking out, they told me I needed to give more blood. It was very frustrating when you're already stressed to be there for medical reasons.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your online review. We're pleased to have been able to serve you, though it's clear we have areas to improve. We're committed to excellence and would greatly value any further feedback you could provide. Please visit flcancer.com/patient-experience/ and complete the feedback form so we may contact you privately for more details.

reviews.review_text:
The staff were effective and the doctor spent  time answering my questions and showed
Concern for me as a  person
reviews.owner_answer: Your words reflect the kind of care we strive to provide—thorough, compassionate, and personalized. Thank you for sharing your experience.

reviews.review_text:
I spent over two hours at this office for a hematology appointment, and my actual time with the doctor was less than ten minutes. An hour past my scheduled appointment time, I still hadn’t seen the doctor, so I politely pulled a nurse aside to ask for an update and mentioned that I needed to get back to work. Her response was, “When do you need to be back at work?”—which completely missed the point. Patients’ time is valuable and should be respected.

When I went to the lab for bloodwork, no one even acknowledged me until I interrupted a group of staff who were celebrating and passing around cake. Check-out was just as frustrating, staff had their heads down and didn’t acknowledge me until again I spoke up. When I finally tried to schedule my iron infusions, the woman assisting me seemed confused and unorganized.

Overall, there was a clear lack of professionalism, communication, and respect for patients’ time. I left feeling frustrated and disappointed.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your online review. We're pleased to have been able to serve you, though it's clear we have areas to improve. We're committed to excellence and would greatly value any further feedback you could provide. Please visit flcancer.com/patient-experience/ and complete the feedback form so we may contact you privately for more details.

reviews.review_text: I see a lot of doctors, but the people in this center take very good care of the patient.  I need referrals for appointments, and the staff always gets them for me.  I have to do blood tests every time I go, and the people in their lab take me in right away.  It sometimes takes awhile for the doctor to get to the examination room, buy I'm sure that's because she always takes time with each patient, answering questions and explaining everything.
reviews.owner_answer: Your feedback means a lot to our team. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and let us know how we are doing.

reviews.review_text: I am always treated with compassion and kindness by everyone. There is almost no waiting time before every appointment.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We're thrilled to hear that your experience has been a positive one. We'll be sure to share your feedback with the team at Florida Cancer Specialists Boca Raton.
